summary: A website that tracks clearance items and deals from Home Depot and Lowe's stores near the user's location
architectural_notes: Website will need to integrate with or scrape Home Depot and Lowe's for clearance/deal data
Location services required to determine user's nearby stores

existing_features.title: Create a main page that displays all clearance items from both Home Depot and Lowe's in a grid or list view, showing product name, store name, original price, clearance price, discount percentage, and store location
Implement location-based filtering that allows users to see only clearance items from stores near their location, with the ability to specify a radius (e.g., within 10, 25, or 50 miles)
Add filter controls to allow users to filter items by store (Home Depot only, Lowe's only, or both), product category, and price range with min/max inputs
Display a deals section that highlights the best discounts (highest percentage off) from both stores, sorted by discount percentage in descending order

Create a clean, modern visual design with a cohesive color scheme that uses warm, approachable tones like amber and terracotta, contemporary sans-serif typography, and card-based layouts with subtle shadows and rounded corners for an inviting shopping experience

new_feature_requests.summary: Track Home Depot clearance items near user location
Track Lowe's clearance items near user location
Display all deals from both stores

Create a backend data model to store clearance items with fields: store name (Home Depot or Lowe's), product name, original price, clearance price, discount percentage, product category, store location (address, city, state, zip code, coordinates), availability status, and timestamp of last update
Implement backend functions to add, update, retrieve, and delete clearance items with filtering capabilities by store name, location, and price range
